message:
fix(console): make MigrationStatus render_styled width-safe and Unicode-safe

Apply the same hardening pattern used in ErrorPanel to MigrationStatus:

- Clamp minimum render width to 6 via .max(6) to prevent underflow in
  border/padding arithmetic
- Replace all unchecked subtraction in border rendering (top border,
  separator, migration entry divider, bottom border, wrap_line padding)
  with saturating_sub
- Add truncate_plain_to_width helper that operates on char boundaries
  instead of byte indices, preventing mid-codepoint panics when
  truncating Unicode migration names
- Replace byte-index version_name truncation (&version_name[..27]) with
  the new char-safe truncation path

Regression tests added:
- test_migration_render_styled_tiny_width_does_not_panic: width=1 with
  a real migration record verifies no panics and valid box drawing
- test_migration_render_styled_unicode_name_truncation: migration name
  consisting entirely of emoji at width=80 verifies "..." truncation
  without byte-boundary panics

Also syncs .beads/issues.jsonl with the tracking issue.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
